name: agency email
script:
sender_email = doc.raised_by

if sender_email:
    agency_data = frappe.db.get_value(
        "Agency",
        {"email": sender_email},
        ["pcc_code", "agency_name"],
        as_dict=True
    )
    
    if agency_data:
        doc.pcc = agency_data.pcc_code
        doc.agency_name = agency_data.agency_name
    else:
        # لو مش لاقي Agency
        doc.pcc = "Unknown"
        doc.agency_name = f"Unknown - {sender_email}"
